faqs.question: How much does silverfish extermination cost in South Jamaica?
faqs.answer: Silverfish control services in South Jamaica typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property and severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before starting any treatment.

faqs.question: Why do I have silverfish in my South Jamaica home?
faqs.answer: Silverfish are attracted to moisture and humidity, which are common in South Jamaica basements, bathrooms, and kitchens, especially in older homes. They feed on starches, paper, and fabrics, making any home with these materials vulnerable to infestation.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to silverfish problems in South Jamaica?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout South Jamaica and the surrounding Queens areas. Our local technicians can typically arrive within 24 hours of your call to assess and begin treatment.

faqs.question: Are your silverfish treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and eco-friendly treatment methods that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We provide clear instructions for any necessary precautions during and after treatment.
